name: Indoor Golf Links of America
about: Indoor Golf Links of America is an indoor golf facility located in Orland Park, Illinois, offering a comprehensive golf simulation experience. The venue provides access to league play through its partnership with iglaleague.com, and features dedicated food and drink services. With multiple simulator bays available, it caters to both individual practice and group events, presenting itself as a versatile destination for golfers seeking an indoor experience in the Chicago area.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf access in a climate-controlled environment
Convenient location in the Chicago suburbs with easy parking
Support for both individual practice and organized leagues
Availability of food and beverages to enhance the social experience

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available with a dedicated food and drink page on the website
No information about alcohol service; no BYOB keywords found

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available or if bringing your own clubs is required.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site kitchen and serves food and drinks, but it's unclear if outside food and drink are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information about typical duration for playing 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears to be family-friendly, featuring a kids-friendly tag and offering party packages suitable for various group types.
